recommendations.title: Balto
recommendations.overview: An outcast half-wolf risks his life to prevent a deadly epidemic from ravaging Nome, Alaska.

recommendations.title: The Prince of Egypt
recommendations.overview: The strong bond between two Royal Egyptian brothers is challenged when their chosen responsibilities set them at odds, with extraordinary consequences.
recommendations.director: Simon Wells, Steve Hickner, Brenda Chapman

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.overview: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th-century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds mankind divided into two warring races.

recommendations.title: Mars Needs Moms
recommendations.overview: When Martians suddenly abduct his mom, mischievous Milo rushes to the rescue and discovers why all moms are so special.

recommendations.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
recommendations.overview: Some time after the Mousekewitz's have settled in America, they find that they are still having problems with the threat of cats. That makes them eager to try another home out in the west, where they are promised that mice and cats live in peace. Unf

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Vendetta
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a fearless enemy out for revenge unleashes a brutal and deadly new virus, BSAA captain Chris Redfield enlists the help of Agent Leon S. Kennedy and Professor Rebecca Chambers to bring down the death merchant and save New York City.

recommendations.title: Night at the Museum: Kahmunrah Rises Again
